creator: osa@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #5)

Hi Daniel,

the original patch was committed by @roam 20 years go, https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/e206293405dfb60cbbea01d542d7e367eca8a9d3

I'm not totally sure of its validity for now, so I'd prefer to pass your request to the port maintainer, thanks.
